scores.dimension: Layer coverage (unit / integration / fuzz / invariant / symbolic / fork)
scores.anchor_matched: 7 anchor: unit, integration, invariant, and fork layers are non-trivially populated; lower-anchor observations are 0 testFuzz_ functions and 0 symbolic/prove functions, so the suite cannot reach the 9 anchor.

evidence.note: Unit-style tests cover start/resolve success, revert, and event paths.
Integration tests exercise accepted, rejected, not-yet-resolved, and second-evaluation lifecycles.
Multi-contract phase-5 simulation tests legitimate and adversarial paths.
StdInvariant harness targets a handler and defines two invariant_* properties.
Gated Gnosis fork test reads live proposal/CTF state and asserts outcome/payout properties.
Observed counts: 250 test functions, 0 testFuzz_ functions, 5 invariant markers, 0 symbolic/prove functions, 8 fork calls; no Echidna/Medusa/Certora files outside excluded deps.

scores.anchor_matched: Between 5 and 7: stable spec IDs and a partial pass-status matrix exist, and source NatSpec cites IDs, but fewer than 60% of invariants map to executable tests and test files contain no INV-* or @spec tags.

evidence.note: Canonical invariant document defines stable IDs, prose, predicates, citations, and STATED/TESTED/PROVED status.
Traceability rules require test tags; pass-status table maps only a subset of 15 IDs to partial or named tests, leaving many untested.
Source NatSpec references INV-SALE-001, INV-SALE-004, INV-SALE-002, and INV-SALE-003.
Source NatSpec references INV-ARB-005, INV-ARB-004, INV-ARB-002, and INV-ARB-006.
No matches in test files, so executable checks are not tagged with spec IDs.

scores.anchor_matched: 3 band with upward adjustment: coverage is above 50% and tests are assertion-rich, but there is no mutation tool, no mutation baseline, no coverage gate, and coverage is below the 75%/gate requirements for the 5 anchor.

evidence.note: Total coverage row reported 59.45% lines, 57.37% statements, 31.73% branches, and 65.10% functions.
Representative behavior tests assert exact bond matching and revert conditions rather than only no-revert smoke.
Representative sale tests assert effective-supply and ragequit accounting state deltas.
Foundry config has no mutation, coverage threshold, or CI profile configuration.
CI runs fmt, build, and forge test only; no coverage or mutation gate is configured.
No vertigo/gambit/sumo/mutation config or .vertigorc/vertigo.yml was found in foundry.toml, .github, Makefile, or repo root.

scores.anchor_matched: 5 anchor: fork tests cover major external boundaries and are env-gated, but all observed forks use floating latest blocks and CI does not run fork tests; no Tenderly or mainnet-shadow staging is wired.

evidence.note: Gnosis fork test is gated by RUN_GNOSIS_FORK_TESTS and uses createSelectFork(vm.rpcUrl("gnosis")) with no pinned block.
Swapr/Algebra fork test exercises real Gnosis token and position-manager addresses, also with an unpinned fork.
E2E fork test documents RUN_GNOSIS_FORK_TESTS gating and forks Gnosis without a block number.
The main CI workflow runs forge test without setting RUN_GNOSIS_FORK_TESTS or a fork-specific job.
Observed 8 createSelectFork/createFork call sites and no .github workflow match for RUN_.*FORK.*TESTS or forge test.*fork.

scores.anchor_matched: Between 3 and 5: PR CI runs fmt/build/tests and a separate Slither gate exists, but Foundry is not version-pinned, [profile.ci] is absent, seeds are not deterministic, and coverage/gas/fork gates are missing.

evidence.note: CI runs on push, pull_request, and manual dispatch with FOUNDRY_PROFILE=ci.
Workflow checks out code, installs foundry-rs/foundry-toolchain@v1 without a version input, then runs fmt, build, and forge test.
Only default profile, lint, rpc_endpoints, and fmt sections exist; no [profile.ci], fuzz seed, invariant seed, or coverage/gas gates are defined.
Separate Slither job is configured to run on PR/push and fail on medium/high findings while uploading SARIF.
Search found no forge coverage, forge snapshot, gas-report, codecov, deterministic seed, fork-test job, or artifact upload in CI.

scores.anchor_matched: 3 anchor with slight upward adjustment for a blocking Slither workflow: the committed stack is Foundry plus Slither only; SMTChecker, Echidna/Medusa/Halmos/hevm/Certora/Kontrol, and differential tests are absent.

evidence.note: Slither action is wired with fail-on: medium and an explicit failure re-emission step.
Slither configuration excludes low-signal detectors/dependencies and forces Foundry compilation.
No SMTChecker/model_checker, symbolic, or external-fuzzer profile is configured.

Search excluding lib/.claude/out/cache found no echidna, medusa, halmos, certora, kontrol, hevm, smtchecker, or model_checker config; differential/equivalence search in test files returned no matches.

evaluator_notes: No prior topic-4 evaluation file existed, so no per-dimension deltas were computed. forge was not on PATH; commands used ~/.foundry/bin/forge. Non-fork forge test passed 245/245. Coverage total is Forge's reported total including test/mocks. Negative tool searches excluded lib/.claude/out/cache where noted.
